zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Plampin於大約1560年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，她的父親John Plampin36歲，母親Elizabeth Frances Kellaway36歲。她於1604年8月7日與Francis Elliot在英國英格蘭艾可福達哈姆結婚。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Plampin于大约1560年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，她的父亲John Plampin36岁，母亲Elizabeth Frances Kellaway36岁。她于1604年8月7日与Francis Elliot在英国英格兰艾可福達哈姆结婚。

nameMeanings.name: Plampin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from Old French blanc pain ‘white bread’, perhaps a nickname for a baker.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Plampin was born about 1560, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Plampin, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth Frances Kellaway, was 36. She married Francis Elliot on 7 August 1604, in Fordham, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Plampin est née environ 1560, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Plampin, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Frances Kellaway, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Elliot le 7 août 1604, à Fordham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Plampin um 1560 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Plampin 36 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Frances Kellaway 36. Sie hat am 7. August 1604 in Fordham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Francis Elliot geheiratet.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Plampin è nata il circa 1560 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Plampin, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Frances Kellaway, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Francis Elliot il 7 agosto 1604, nel Fordham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Plampin(이)가 대략 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Plampin(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Frances Kellaway(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1604년 8월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 포드함에서 Francis Elliot(와)과 결혼했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Plampin nasceu aproximadamente 1560, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Plampin, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Frances Kellaway, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Elliot em 7 de agosto de 1604, em Fordham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Plampin родилась около 1560 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Plampin было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Frances Kellaway, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Elliot 7 августа 1604 г. в местности фордхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
